finding: During ATM-GOV-0134 close commit, pre-commit reran validate:cli and failed on existing atm-memory-consolidate skill template prose containing downstream-only tools_node/, even though the active task did not edit that memory-consolidation surface and the handoff explicitly marked it as external residue.
expectedBehavior: Pre-commit framework validation should distinguish current-task failures from unrelated baseline/template residue, or provide a governed baseline waiver/repair lane that does not force the active task to commit unrelated memory-consolidation files.
evidenceOrRepro: node atm.mjs git commit --actor codex-gpt-5-5-captain --task ATM-GOV-0134 --message "feat(governance): complete ATM-GOV-0134" --json failed with ATM_FRAMEWORK_VALIDATOR_FAILED; nested validator-run-resume-and-status reported validate-product-charter failure: templates/skills/atm-memory-consolidate.skill.md contains downstream-only term: tools_node/.
followUp: Create a follow-up task for pre-commit baseline/current-task classification around validator-run-resume-and-status and product-charter checks; do not mix the memory-consolidation template repair into ATM-GOV-0134.
